Components / Thinking

Preview theme

Thinking

A composed “thinking” label that pairs a tilted saucer icon with animated text. The text cycles through a slanted shimmer highlight and rainbow gradient via CSS @keyframes. The trailing dots animate sequentially — appearing one by one then fading — inside the same gradient clip, so they sweep through the same rainbow colours as the text.

Surface

surface="default" · surface="shadow-border"
LoadingThinkingLoading...LoadingThinkingLoading...

Custom Label

Custom children — dots appended automatically
LoadingGeneratingLoading...LoadingSearchingLoading...LoadingAnalyzingLoading...
dots={false} — label controls its own punctuation
LoadingAlmost there…

Text Scramble

Cycles through spaceship-themed labels every 3 s. Each label transition runs a character-decode scramble: random symbols resolve left-to-right over ~900 ms, revealing the new word. Disabled automatically when disableMotion is set.

textScramble — default
LoadingThinkingLoading...
textScramble + surface="shadow-border"
LoadingThinkingLoading...

Shimmer Variant

shimmerVariant="blob" (default) — JS-driven radial blobs
LoadingThinkingLoading...
shimmerVariant="linear" — pure CSS rainbow sweep
LoadingThinkingLoading...
shimmerVariant="subtle" — secondary→white sweep
LoadingThinkingLoading...

ThinkingSaucer — Standalone

The saucer icon can also be used standalone. Defaults to lg (24×24 px). Animates with a 4-corner patrol: translates to each corner of its bounding box, pauses, and rocks left-right (CSS rotateY with perspective) as if scanning the area.

Sizes — lg (24px) · xl (28px)
LoadingLoading
surface="shadow-border"
Loading
disableMotion — static saucer, no animation
LoadingLoading

ThinkingSaucer Props

PropTypeDefaultDescription
size"lg" | "xl""lg"Icon size: lg = 24px, xl = 28px.
surface"default" | "shadow-border""default"shadow-border adds a rounded shadow ring around the icon.
durationnumber4Exposed for API consistency; internal animation speeds are fixed.
disableMotionbooleanfalseSkips the patrol animation and renders a static centered saucer.
classNamestring—Additional classes merged via cn().

ThinkingSaucer Usage

tsx
import { ThinkingSaucer } from '@spaceship/design-system';

// Default — lg (24px), patrol animation
<ThinkingSaucer />

// Sizes
<ThinkingSaucer size="lg" />
<ThinkingSaucer size="xl" />

// Surface
<ThinkingSaucer surface="shadow-border" />

// Static — no animation
<ThinkingSaucer disableMotion />

Static

disableMotion — static saucer, plain secondary text
LoadingThinking…

Props

PropTypeDefaultDescription
surface"default" | "shadow-border""default"shadow-border wraps the label in a pill-shaped shadow ring.
shimmerVariant"blob" | "linear" | "subtle""blob"Controls the shimmer style applied to both text and dots. subtle uses a secondary→white sweep instead of rainbow colours.
dotsbooleantrueAppend sequentially-animated dots after the label. Set to false when passing a label that already includes punctuation.
textScramblebooleanfalseCycle through themed loading labels (Thinking, Launching, Orbiting…) with a character-decode scramble effect every 3 s. Characters resolve left-to-right over ~900 ms. Bypasses ShimmerText — the decode animation is the visual effect. Overrides children. Disabled when disableMotion is set.
disableMotionbooleanfalseRenders a static saucer and plain secondary-coloured text. No CSS animation.
childrenReactNode"Thinking"Text label shown beside the dots. Omit trailing punctuation — the component appends its own animated dots by default.
classNamestring—Additional classes applied to the outer wrapper span.

Usage

tsx
import { Thinking } from '@spaceship/design-system';

// Default — saucer icon, blob shimmer
<Thinking />

// Subtle — secondary→white shimmer + dots
<Thinking shimmerVariant="subtle" />

// Linear — pure CSS rainbow sweep
<Thinking shimmerVariant="linear" />

// Custom label — dots appended automatically
<Thinking>Generating</Thinking>

// Custom label with own punctuation — opt out of auto-dots
<Thinking dots={false}>Almost there…</Thinking>

// Shadow-border surface — pill-shaped shadow ring
<Thinking surface="shadow-border" />

// Static — no CSS animation, plain secondary text
<Thinking disableMotion />

// Text scramble — character-decode effect cycling every 3 s
<Thinking textScramble />
<Thinking textScramble surface="shadow-border" />

// Text scramble is a no-op when motion is disabled
<Thinking textScramble disableMotion />

ShimmerText

An inline text shimmer that applies an animated gradient clip to its children. Two animation styles: blob drives three radial gradient blobs via a JS useAnimationFrame loop — organic, drifting motion. linear uses a pure-CSS background-position sweep — wider colour bands, fixed tempo, zero JS overhead.

Variant Comparison

variant="blob" (default) — JS-driven radial blobs
Thinking
variant="linear" — pure CSS rainbow sweep
Thinking
variant="subtle" — secondary→white CSS sweep
Thinking

Subtle Variant

Monochrome shimmer from --text-secondary to white — quieter than the rainbow variants, suitable for less prominent loading states.

ShimmerText + ShimmerDots — subtle variant, side by side
ThinkingLoading...
ShimmerText subtle — custom labels
GeneratingSearchingAnalyzing

Custom Text

variant="blob"
GeneratingSearchingAnalyzing
variant="linear"
GeneratingSearchingAnalyzing

Static

disableMotion — plain secondary text, no animation, both variants
ThinkingThinking

Props

PropTypeDefaultDescription
variant"blob" | "linear" | "subtle""blob"Animation style. blob = JS-driven radial blobs that drift and wobble organically. linear = pure-CSS rainbow sweep, no JS. subtle = secondary→white CSS sweep, no JS.
disableMotionbooleanfalseRenders plain secondary-coloured text with no animation.
childrenReactNode—Text content to apply the shimmer effect to.
classNamestring—Additional classes merged via cn().

Usage

tsx
import { ShimmerText, ShimmerDots } from '@spaceship/design-system';

// Default — blob variant, JS-driven radial blobs
<ShimmerText>Thinking</ShimmerText>

// Linear — pure CSS rainbow sweep
<ShimmerText variant="linear">Thinking</ShimmerText>

// Subtle — secondary→white CSS sweep
<ShimmerText variant="subtle">Thinking</ShimmerText>

// Subtle dots
<ShimmerDots variant="subtle" />

// Static — no animation, plain secondary text
<ShimmerText disableMotion>Thinking</ShimmerText>
